scripts.build: npm run build -w @mini-hads/domain && npm run build -w @mini-hads/api && npm run build -w @mini-hads/miniapp
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mini-hads/domain && npm run lint -w @mini-hads/api && npm run lint -w @mini-hads/miniapp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mini-hads/domain && npm run typecheck -w @mini-hads/api && npm run typecheck -w @mini-hads/miniapp
